title: 8 Marks of a Man Worth Following
caption:
Leadership isn't a position. It's a pattern.

The men worth following aren't always the loudest or the ones with the biggest platform. They're the ones who go first into the cost — the apology, the hard conversation, the hit they take so someone else doesn't have to.

Christ led by going first into death for the people he loved. What's here is just the smaller version of that same shape: go first.

Eight marks. Most of them cost something. That's the point.

Which one do you need to build this week?

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #leadership #discipleship #christian #character
theme: He leads by going first into the cost.
